overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the Kabuki district, transitioning from a covered walkway to sunlit city streets and elevated walkways, featuring futuristic architecture, neon billboards, and holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered concrete pedestrian walkway with overhead fluorescent lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered concrete corridor with blue fluorescent lighting overhead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the corridor

entered.detail: low concrete ceiling with exposed beams and fluorescent light fixtures
smooth concrete walls with horizontal recessed lighting strips
smooth concrete walls with horizontal recessed lighting strips
long blue-white fluorescent lights mounted on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered concrete corridor illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights. The walls feature horizontal light strips, and a few pedestrians are visible walking ahead in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell descending to street level with neon signage

events.description: exits covered walkway and enters concrete stairwell
natural daylight becomes visible at the bottom of the stairs

agents.ego_description: descending a concrete staircase alongside other pedestrians, moving toward the street exit

entered.detail: descending concrete stairs with metal handrails on both sides
red neon sign with white text reading YUTSUKI ELECTRONICS
metal handrails along the stairwell walls

segments.scene_description: The character exits the corridor into a concrete stairwell, descending toward street level. A red neon sign for Yutsuki Electronics is visible on the right wall, and daylight becomes increasingly visible at the bottom of the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban street with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements

events.description: exits stairwell onto sunlit city sidewalk
turns right to follow the sidewalk along the street

agents.ego_description: walking along a futuristic city sidewalk surrounded by towering buildings with neon billboards and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: car driving along the city street

entered.detail: asphalt road with moving traffic and parked vehicles
tall futuristic buildings with glass and steel facades towering above
large digital advertisements and neon signs covering building faces
large digital advertisements and neon signs on building faces

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto a sunlit city street, the character walks along a sidewalk lined with futuristic skyscrapers covered in holographic billboards and neon advertisements. The scene features light traffic and scattered pedestrians in a dense urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with graffiti-covered access stairs and urban infrastructure

events.description: approaches and begins ascending graffiti-covered stairs to elevated walkway
reaches top of stairs and enters covered elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: ascending a stairway covered in colorful graffiti and continuing along an elevated walkway with vending machines and urban debris

entered.detail: concrete stairs covered in colorful graffiti and street art
covered pedestrian walkway with concrete flooring and overhead protection
blue vending machines with illuminated displays along the walkway
elevated train track structure spanning across the street above

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a stairway covered in vibrant graffiti to reach an elevated walkway. The walkway features vending machines and trash debris while providing a view of the surrounding skyscrapers and an overhead monorail track.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed corridor into the sprawling, sunlit expanse of a futuristic city. It begins within a concrete walkway illuminated by fluorescent overheads and horizontal light strips, following a character and other pedestrians forward. As the character exits the corridor, the scene shifts into a concrete stairwell where a red Yutsuki Electronics neon sign glows against the walls, leading the camera down toward the brightening daylight. The environment then opens up onto a vibrant city street lined with skyscrapers and holographic billboards, before turning toward a graffiti-covered stairway. Finally, the camera ascends to an elevated walkway cluttered with vending machines and debris, revealing a wide view of the surrounding urban architecture and an overhead monorail track.
